entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange operated by BME Technologies OÜ, providing spot trading, market listings, fiat gateway services, account funding and withdrawals, professional trading tools, and API access.
entity.notes: Current first-party website exposes markets, spot trading, login, signup, fiat gateway services, professional trading tools, and API documentation. The footer identifies BME Technologies OÜ in Estonia as the platform operator and references a Canadian MSB license. Duplicate candidate source rows are consolidated under one Emirex entity.

evidence.title: Emirex official exchange platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform exposes markets, spot exchange access, login and signup, fiat gateway services, professional trading tools, fees, API documentation, and platform operator information.

evidence.title: Emirex Markets
evidence.notes: Current first-party markets page exposes market categories, spot trading navigation, login/signup flows, fees, and API documentation links.

evidence.title: Emirex API Documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party exchange site links the dedicated Emirex API documentation endpoint for programmatic exchange access.
